original_prompt: deletion is not working for any entities
rephrased_goal: Fix deletion logic across all modules by resolving dynamic element listener binding issues, improving polling frequency for reactive UI updates, and ensuring async operations provide feedback.

Replace view.$(...) with container.querySelector(...) inside renderFormsList
Replace view.$(...) with list.querySelector(...) inside renderTriggersList
Add await to deleteDoc and provide console feedack
Ensure delete listeners use await and handle success/error feedback
tasks.testing_criteria: Hard deletions work and are responsive.

subtasks_required: Verify all 'delete' buttons across app use correct selectors
